title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Pidilite Industries

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Pidilite Industries
jsonLd.description:
We at Pidilite Industries are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pidilite Industries:
Pidilite Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
